email.title: Free Temporary Email Address - 10 Minute Mail | Tool Box Nova
email.meta_desc: Get a free disposable temporary email address instantly. Auto-expires in 10 minutes, no registration needed.
email.how.label: How It Works
email.how.title: Get a temporary email in three simple steps
email.step1.title: Auto-generated address
email.step1.desc: A random temporary email address is automatically created for you when you visit the page. You can also set a custom prefix for a more memorable address.
email.step2.title: Receive emails
email.step2.desc: Use the temporary email address to sign up for services or receive messages. The inbox auto-refreshes every few seconds so you see new emails instantly.
email.step3.title: Auto-destroy when done
email.step3.desc: When you're finished, simply close the page or click Destroy to delete the mailbox. All messages are automatically purged after the session ends.
email.privacy.label: 100% Private
email.privacy.title: Your real inbox stays clean and spam-free
email.privacy.body1: A temporary email address shields your real inbox from spam, promotional emails, and potential data breaches. Use it for one-time sign-ups, free trials, and any situation where you don't want to share your real email.
email.privacy.body2: All temporary email accounts and messages are automatically deleted. No data is retained after your session ends, ensuring complete privacy with no traces left behind.
email.about.label: About
email.about.seo.title: Free temporary email — disposable email address, instant inbox, no registration
email.about.body1: This temporary email service provides instant disposable email addresses that self-destruct automatically. No registration, no personal information required — just open the page and start receiving emails immediately.
email.about.body2: Each temporary mailbox lasts for 10 minutes and auto-refreshes to check for new messages. You can read full email content including HTML emails, view attachments, and click verification links directly from the inbox.
email.about.body3: Temporary emails are perfect for signing up for free trials, downloading resources, registering on forums, testing email functionality in applications, or any situation where you want to protect your real email from spam. The service is completely free with no limits.
email.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
email.faq.q1: How long does the temporary email last?
email.faq.a1: Each temporary email address lasts for 10 minutes. You can extend it by refreshing the page or generate a new address at any time by clicking the Change button.
email.faq.a2: Yes, most verification codes and confirmation emails are delivered within seconds. The inbox auto-refreshes to ensure you see new messages as soon as they arrive.
email.faq.q3: Can I set a custom email address?
email.faq.a3: Yes, you can set a custom prefix for your temporary email address. Enter your desired prefix in the custom field and click Settings to apply it.
email.faq.q4: Is it safe to use temporary emails?
email.faq.a4: Temporary emails are great for protecting your privacy, but they should not be used for important accounts (banking, primary email). Since anyone with the address can access the inbox, they are best suited for one-time use cases.
email.faq.a5: No registration is required. Simply visit the page and a temporary email address is automatically generated for you. The service is completely free with no sign-up or account needed.
